name: Storage Technology Corporation (StorageTek)
description: Storage Technology Corporation, commonly known as StorageTek, was a prominent American data storage technology company headquartered in Louisville, Colorado. Founded in 1969, the company became a world leader in the design and manufacture of high-performance information storage and retrieval devices, specializing in tape backup equipment, disk storage solutions, and software for managing complex storage systems. StorageTek served mainframe and mid-range computer environments for decades before being acquired by Sun Microsystems in 2005, which was subsequently purchased by Oracle Corporation in 2010, integrating StorageTek's legacy into a broader enterprise technology portfolio.
